ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the NLP model */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the model is trained on (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of NLP model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, deep learning) */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset used to train the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, F1-score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "fscore" REAL /* F-score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "vmeasure" REAL /* V-measure of the model */,
  "homogeneity" REAL /* Homogeneity of the model */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the model */,
  "fs_vm_score" REAL /* F-score * v-measure score */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used (e.g., F-score, precision, recall) */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Evaluation result (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_languages" (
  "model_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-language pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Language proficiency level of the model (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_languages_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "evaluation_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Details of the evaluation result (e.g., pass with 90% accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "comparison_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison result */,
  "model1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first model */,
  "model2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second model */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., model1 better, model2 better) */,
  "comparison_metric" TEXT /* Comparison metric used (e.g., F-score, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_model1_id FOREIGN KEY ("model1_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_model2_id FOREIGN KEY ("model2_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_models" (
  "researcher_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-model pair */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the model (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_models_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model (e.g., v1.0, v2.0) */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Version release date */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Version description (e.g., minor update, major update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
